# Hormulse AI

> AI-powered hormone wellness companion. Track mood, sleep, and energy. Chat with an AI that knows your patterns and get a personalized daily plan.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and getting started.
- [About](/about): What Hormulse AI is, who built it, and FAQ.
- [Sign in](/auth): Sign in or create an account.

## Optional

- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Personal wellness snapshot (auth required).
- [AI Chat](/chat): Streaming AI chat with image analysis (auth required).
- [Tracking](/tracking): Daily mood/sleep/energy logging (auth required).
- [Daily Plan](/plan): AI-generated personalized plan (auth required).
- [Education](/education): Hormone wellness articles (auth required).
